Author: GitHub
Title: Copilot CLI for beginners: Plan, delegate, and review
Description:
Did you know you can have GitHub Copilot CLI build features for you in the background? We explore how to use the plan and delegate commands to create a draft pull request while you work on other tasks. After the cloud agent finishes coding, we show you how to review the changes directly in your terminal. Watch to see how these three commands streamline your daily developer workflow.

#GitHubCopilot #CopilotCLI #GitHubCodingAgent
